evals.prompt: The platform has Kubernetes namespaces but no documented RBAC boundary and secrets are only described as prompt variables.
evals.expected_output: Marks readiness not ready, records RBAC and secret-injection blockers, and refuses to proceed to a Gravity pilot.
assertions: RBAC and secrets are assessed as separate readiness domains.
Secret values are not requested or copied.
A gate or issue is recommended.

evals.prompt: Agent Platform CI/CD and review environments exist, but no end-to-end non-Gravity pilot has been run.
evals.expected_output: Defines the minimum safe pilot and marks platform readiness incomplete until the full intake-to-review loop is proven.
assertions: A non-Gravity pilot is required before Gravity.
CI/CD, preview, human review, and ledger evidence are included.
